name: 4s and 5s

setup.description: Alternate tee shots between your driver and your 5-wood, five swings with each club, both aimed at the same fairway.

rules.description: Play 10 tee shots total, switching clubs every swing (driver, 5-wood, driver, 5-wood...).
scoring: 1 point per shot that finishes in the fairway
Alternate clubs every swing, no exceptions

caption: Switching clubs every swing exposes a lazy setup fast. Driver, 5-wood, repeat. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
